sentences.target: Ma sœur est peintre à Lyon.

translations.fr: Ma sœur est peintre à Lyon.
translations.en: My sister is a painter in Lyon.
translations.es: Mi hermana es pintora en Lyon.
translations.de: Meine Schwester ist Malerin in Lyon.
translations.it: Mia sorella è pittrice a Lione.
translations.pt: Minha irmã é pintora em Lyon.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi là họa sĩ ở Lyon.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is kunstschilder in Lyon.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन लियोन में चित्रकार है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest malarką w Lyonie.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου είναι ζωγράφος στη Λυών.
translations.nb: Søsteren min er maler i Lyon.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya adalah pelukis di Lyon.
translations.sv: Min syster är konstnär i Lyon.
translations.ro: Sora mea este pictoriță în Lyon.
translations.cs: Moje sestra je malířka v Lyonu.
translations.da: Min søster er kunstmaler i Lyon.
translations.ja: 私の妹はリヨンで画家です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing feminine singular; modifies 'sœur' to mark possession.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase 'Ma sœur'.
Copular auxiliary in present 3sg; links the subject to the predicate nominal.
Predicate nominative (profession) complement of the copula 'est'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'à', naming the city.

sentences.target: Le peintre arrive vers neuf heures.

translations.fr: Le peintre arrive vers neuf heures.
translations.en: The painter is arriving around nine o'clock.
translations.es: El pintor llega sobre las nueve.
translations.de: Der Maler kommt gegen neun Uhr.
translations.it: Il pittore arriva verso le nove.
translations.ru: Маляр приедет примерно в девять часов.
translations.pt: O pintor chega por volta das nove.
translations.vi: Người thợ sơn sẽ đến vào khoảng chín giờ.
translations.nl: De schilder komt rond negen uur.
translations.el: Ο μπογιατζής έρχεται γύρω στις εννέα.
translations.id: Tukang cat datang sekitar jam sembilan.
translations.ro: Zugravul sosește pe la ora nouă.
translations.ja: ペンキ職人は九時ごろ来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the noun 'peintre' as specific/known.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main intransitive verb in present 3sg; predicates the subject.
Preposition indicating approximate time.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures' (nummod).
Common noun; head of the temporal noun phrase governed by 'vers'.

sentences.target: On cherche un peintre pour demain.

translations.fr: On cherche un peintre pour demain.
translations.en: We're looking for a painter for tomorrow.
translations.de: Wir suchen einen Maler für morgen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找明天能来的油漆工。
translations.yue: 我哋搵緊一個聽日可以嚟嘅油漆師傅。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um pintor para amanhã.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một thợ sơn cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: We zoeken een schilder voor morgen.
translations.hi: हम कल के लिए एक पेंटर ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en maler til i morgen.
translations.id: Kami mencari tukang cat untuk besok.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en målare till i morgon.
translations.da: Vi søger en maler til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日来られる塗装職人を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; takes 3sg verb agreement.
Transitive main verb in present 3sg; selects a direct object.
Indefinite article introducing a new referent.
Common noun; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition marking a purpose/temporal complement.
Temporal adverb functioning as the complement of 'pour'.

sentences.target: Je dois appeler le peintre cet après-midi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa zaple lə pɛ̃tʁ sɛt apʁɛ midi/

translations.fr: Je dois appeler le peintre cet après-midi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa zaple lə pɛ̃tʁ sɛt apʁɛ midi/
translations.en: I have to call the painter this afternoon.
translations.es: Tengo que llamar al pintor esta tarde.
translations.de: Ich muss den Maler heute Nachmittag anrufen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天下午得给油漆工打电话。
translations.yue: 我今日下午要打畀油漆師傅。
translations.ru: Мне нужно позвонить маляру сегодня после обеда.
translations.pt: Tenho que ligar para o pintor esta tarde.
translations.he: אני צריך להתקשר לצבעי היום אחר הצהריים.
translations.tr: Bu öğleden sonra boyacıyı aramam gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Tôi phải gọi cho thợ sơn chiều nay.
translations.ar: يجب أن أتصل بالدهّان اليوم بعد الظهر.
translations.nl: Ik moet vanmiddag de schilder bellen.
translations.uk: Мені треба подзвонити маляру сьогодні після обіду.
translations.hu: Délután fel kell hívnom a festőt.
translations.hi: मुझे आज दोपहर पेंटर को फोन करना है.
translations.pl: Muszę zadzwonić do malarza dziś po południu.
translations.el: Πρέπει να καλέσω τον μπογιατζή σήμερα το απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Jeg må ringe maleren i ettermiddag.
translations.id: Saya harus menelepon tukang cat sore ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste ringa målaren i eftermiddag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să sun zugravul astăzi după-amiază.
translations.da: Jeg skal ringe til maleren i eftermiddag.
translations.fi: Minun pitää soittaa maalarille tänä iltapäivänä.
translations.ja: 今日の午後、塗装職人に電話しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Modal verb in present 1sg expressing obligation; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'dois'.
Definite article introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun; direct object of 'appeler'.
Demonstrative determiner (masc. sg. before vowel); modifies 'après-midi' specifying time.
Common noun functioning as a temporal adverbial; head of the NP with 'cet'.

Le peintre arrive vers neuf heures.
On cherche un peintre pour demain.
Je dois appeler le peintre cet après-midi.
fu: /ʒə dwa zaple lə pɛ̃tʁ sɛt apʁɛ midi/

en: My sister is a painter in Lyon.
The painter is arriving around nine o'clock.
We're looking for a painter for tomorrow.
I have to call the painter this afternoon.
